annotations.annotation: Regulations .01—.12 adopted as an emergency provision effective
August 28, 1986 (13:20 Md. R. 2203); emergency status extended at 14:2
Regulations .01—.13 adopted effective March 1, 1987 (14:4 Md. R. 415)
Chapter recodified from COMAR 05.01.26 to COMAR 05.07.01
Regulations .01—.13 repealed and new Regulations .01—.11 adopted effective June 7, 1993 (20:11 Md. R. 912)
Regulation .02B amended effective April 5, 1999 (26:7 Md. R. 539)
Regulation .04 amended effective January 2, 1994 (20:25 Md. R. 1943); April 5, 1999 (26:7 Md. R. 539)
Regulation .05B amended effective January 2, 1994 (20:25 Md. R. 1943)
Chapter repealed effective September 6, 1999 (26:18 Md. R. 1373)
